assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 26-29 of staleness-check.md: 'Read the `<!-- Last-Updated: <ISO-8601> -->` HTML comment from the security matrix file.' Extracted timestamp shown as '2026-05-01T10:00:00Z' (ISO 8601 format) and parsed date as '2026-05-01'.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 32-33: 'Staleness threshold: 14 days (default)' and 'Result: **STALE** (63 days > 14-day threshold)'. Staleness warnings are displayed on lines 40-54 for both streams.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 40-41: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (63 days ago).' Lines 48-49: 'Security matrix for stream **2.2.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (63 days ago).' Each warning includes: stream name (2.1.x/2.2.x), last-updated date (2026-05-01), and days since update (63 days ago).

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 43-46 (repeated lines 51-54): '1. **Refresh now** -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. **Proceed anyway** -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. **Stop** -- halt triage so I can investigate'. All three options present with explicit setup Step 10.6 reference.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 11-13: 'Step 0.3 executes **before** Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization). No Jira operations have been attempted at this point.' Step ordering table (lines 62-68) shows Step 0.3 as 'Blocked -- awaiting user choice' while Step 0.5 is 'Not started -- depends on Step 0.3 resolution'. Lines 56-58 confirm: 'No further triage steps (including Step 0.5 JIRA Access Initialization) will execute until the user responds.'
